subject: Affiliate Prizes Inside
body:
I'll cut to the chase - I wanted to make prizes that were awesome for you AND your friends so it didn't seem awkward to invite them to the $100M Money Models book launch.

Top 10 Referrers WIN (all other prizes) PLUS:

- 30min 1-on-1 Podcast with me, answering your (or your audience's) questions
- Quiet private dinner with Leila and I (and the other 9 top referrers).

Top 50 Referrers WIN:

- Day in Vegas with other top 50 affiliates + 50 winners
- Opportunity to Ask Questions for 3 Straight Hours

Anyone Who Refers 10+ People:

- 70 Profit Tactics Audiobook (these are sick)
- Chance to win one of the 50 spots at my headquarters for a day here in Vegas with me answering whatever questions you want*.
- Recording of that day (no matter if you get picked or not).

Anyone Who Registers to Refer:

- All the behind the scenes breakdowns of how the launch is going: winners, the best content & ads, the numbers, as we countdown to the big day (anyone who registers to refer gets this for free).

If you want credit for referring friends, and cool prizes for your audience, go here.

PS - When you introduce people to something valuable, they associate that value with you. I'm giving so much stuff away - your audience will see this as a give - not an ask. It's gonna be nuts.
